youtube_id: TBD — upload pending; video ready at out-spinner-r11/spinner-wheel-r11-final.mp4

pronunciation_map.Present (verb /prəˈzent/): Use 'Hit Present to go live' — the 'to go live' context cues ElevenLabs to stress the verb form prih-ZENT, not the noun PREZ-ent

youtube_chapters:
0:00 Create and set up a Spinner Wheel slide
0:22 Add entries and preview the spin
0:40 Go live and reveal the winner
youtube_chapters_notes: 3 chapters, 51.14s total, r11 — VO dropout bug fixed; all 7 clips present
notes: AKB-15 r11 — ROOT CAUSE FIX: r10 final had audio truncated to ~10.99s (only s01+s02). Bug was introduced during outro concat: the outro (aha-outro-reusable-1440x900.webm) has no audio stream; when concatenated using filtergraph concat with the mixed narrated webm, only the first ~11s of audio from the narrated file survived (the webm muxer used the outro's audio duration as an upper bound). Fix: (1) add silent audio to outro via anullsrc before concat, (2) use concat demuxer (not filtergraph) for the final assembly. r11 is identical in VO timing to r10 (s01@1.0s through s07@40.5s). Total: 48.12s narrated + 3.00s outro = 51.14s. check_vo_overlap.py PASS (timeline + audio). All 7 VO clips verified by energy scan (-23 to -25 dB at each timestamp). Autofill spotlight intact (real checkbox click action). Not on YouTube (channel cap). Article embed unchanged.

steps.display_text: Want to pick a random participant? Share your QR code — everyone who joins gets spun for automatically.
steps.tts_text: Want to pick a random participant? Share your QR code — everyone who joins gets spun for automatically.

steps.display_text: Select Spinner Wheel from the slide type picker in the Quiz section.
steps.tts_text: Select Spinner Wheel from the slide type picker in the Quiz section.

steps.display_text: Check Participant name autofill in the right panel — participants scan your QR code and enter their name to join, and the wheel fills itself automatically.
steps.tts_text: Tick Participant name autofill in the right panel — scan QR, enter name to join, and the wheel fills itself.

steps.display_text: Or prefer a fixed list? Type entries one per line in the Entries field, or paste a whole list at once.
steps.tts_text: Or prefer a fixed list? Type entries one per line, or paste a whole list at once.

steps.display_text: Click Save — each entry appears as a coloured segment on the wheel.
steps.tts_text: Click Save — each entry appears as a coloured segment on the wheel.

steps.display_text: Click the play button at the centre of the wheel to preview the spin — it lands on a winner!
steps.tts_text: Click the play button at the centre of the wheel to preview the spin — it lands on a winner!

steps.display_text: Hit Present to go live — then press the centre of the wheel to spin for your audience. The winner appears on every screen at once!
steps.tts_text: Hit Present to go live — then press the centre of the wheel to spin for your audience. The winner appears on every screen at once!

mix_command: cd ~/AhaSlides/onboarding-videos && FFMPEG=node_modules/ffmpeg-static/ffmpeg && $FFMPEG -y -i out-spinner-r10/spinner-wheel-r10d-trimmed.webm -i out-spinner-r9/s01.mp3 -i out-spinner-r8b/s02.mp3 -i out-spinner-r8b/s03.mp3 -i out-spinner-r8b/s04_r8.mp3 -i out-spinner-r8b/s05.mp3 -i out-spinner-r8b/s06_r8.mp3 -i out-spinner-r8b/s07_r8.mp3 -filter_complex '[0:v]tpad=stop_mode=clone:stop_duration=5[vpad];[1:a]adelay=1000|1000[a1];[2:a]adelay=9800|9800[a2];[3:a]adelay=14200|14200[a3];[4:a]adelay=22000|22000[a4];[5:a]adelay=29800|29800[a5];[6:a]adelay=35000|35000[a6];[7:a]adelay=40500|40500[a7];[a1][a2][a3][a4][a5][a6][a7]amix=inputs=7:normalize=0:duration=longest[aout]' -map '[vpad]' -map '[aout]' -c:v libvpx -b:v 800k -c:a libopus -b:a 64k out-spinner-r11/spinner-wheel-r11-narrated.webm && $FFMPEG -y -i aha-outro-reusable-1440x900.webm -f lavfi -i anullsrc=r=48000:cl=mono -c:v libvpx -b:v 400k -c:a libopus -b:a 32k -shortest /tmp/spinner-r11-outro-with-audio.webm && $FFMPEG -y -i out-spinner-r11/spinner-wheel-r11-narrated.webm -t 48.12 -c copy /tmp/spinner-r11-trimmed-narrated.webm && echo 'file /tmp/spinner-r11-trimmed-narrated.webm' > /tmp/r11-concat.txt && echo 'file /tmp/spinner-r11-outro-with-audio.webm' >> /tmp/r11-concat.txt && $FFMPEG -y -f concat -safe 0 -i /tmp/r11-concat.txt -c copy out-spinner-r11/spinner-wheel-r11-final.webm && $FFMPEG -y -i out-spinner-r11/spinner-wheel-r11-final.webm -c:v libx264 -preset medium -crf 22 -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:a aac -b:a 128k out-spinner-r11/spinner-wheel-r11-final.mp4
